name: glastrier
flavor_texts: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force.
Glastrier has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond.
text: Glastrier is the Wild Horse Pokémon. It is a ice-type Pokémon. Abilities: chilling-neigh. Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 145, Defense: 130, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 110, Speed: 30. Evolution line: glastrier. Lore: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force. Glastrier has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond.
